hero.title: Others Drop. You Don't.
hero.subtitle: Thrives where networks struggle.
hero.description: k2cc rewrites the rules of congestion control. Where other protocols collapse under heavy packet loss, k2 maintains stable, high throughput. Built on ECH stealth encryption + QUIC/TCP-WS dual-stack transport, deploy in one command.

ech.title: ECH Stealth
ech.description: Encrypted Client Hello hides SNI completely. TLS handshake is undetectable, DPI deep packet inspection is ineffective

zeroDeploy.title: Zero-Config Deployment
zeroDeploy.description: One curl command installs both server and client. Auto-generates k2v5:// connection URI. No manual certificate configuration needed

transport.title: QUIC + TCP-WS Dual Stack
transport.description: Prioritises QUIC for low-latency transport. Automatically falls back to TCP-WebSocket when QUIC is blocked. Seamless switching, imperceptible to users

congestion.title: k2cc Adaptive Rate Control
congestion.description: Proprietary k2cc algorithm automatically finds optimal send rates. Censorship-aware mechanism distinguishes censorship drops from congestion. Far outperforms BBR under GFW high-loss conditions

reverseProxy.title: Reverse Proxy Camouflage
reverseProxy.description: Built-in reverse proxy forwards non-k2 traffic to a real website. Active probing returns legitimate HTTPS responses

selfSign.title: Self-Signed + Certificate Pin
selfSign.description: Self-signed certificate with certificate pinning. Zero CT log exposure. No certificate purchase required. Server domain completely hidden

comparison.title: Protocol Comparison
comparison.subtitle: k2v5 vs. mainstream anti-censorship protocols across key dimensions

downloadCta.title: Download Client
downloadCta.subtitle: Available on Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android

security.title: k2cc — Congestion Control Built to Defeat QoS
security.description: k2cc adaptive rate control is purpose-built to counter censorship QoS throttling and probabilistic packet loss. It automatically distinguishes congestion from censorship-induced drops, maintaining effective throughput under GFW's 26% loss rate. Combined with ECH stealth and QUIC transport — speed and stealth in one.

caTech.title: k2cc Anti-QoS Congestion Control
caTech.description: k2cc automatically distinguishes congestion-induced packet loss from censorship infrastructure actively dropping packets. Under QoS throttling and probabilistic loss, it maintains throughput near link capacity. Zero-config, no manual bandwidth settings — far exceeds BBR and Brutal in censored networks.

advantages.title: Core Features
advantages.item1: ECH encrypts SNI — TLS handshake undetectable
advantages.item2: QUIC-first transport — low latency, high throughput
advantages.item3: k2cc adaptive rate control — far outperforms BBR under censorship
advantages.item4: Reverse proxy camouflage — active probe defence

adaptive.title: Adaptive Transport Layer
adaptive.item1: Auto-fallback from QUIC to TCP-WebSocket when blocked
adaptive.item2: Self-signed certificate + Pin — zero CT log exposure
adaptive.item3: Port reuse — coexists with real website on port 443

multipath.title: ECH Encrypted Handshake
multipath.description: Encrypted Client Hello hides SNI. TLS handshake completely undetectable. DPI identification fails

encryption.title: Dual-Stack Transport
encryption.description: QUIC-first low-latency transport. Automatic TCP-WebSocket fallback. Seamless switching, imperceptible to users

smartRouting.title: k2cc Adaptive Rate Control
smartRouting.description: k2cc automatically finds optimal send rates. Censorship-aware mechanism distinguishes censorship drops. Far outperforms BBR under high-loss conditions

disguise.title: Reverse Proxy Camouflage
disguise.description: Built-in reverse proxy forwards non-tunnel traffic to real website. Active probing returns legitimate HTTPS response

failover.title: Zero-Config Deployment
failover.description: One curl command to install. Auto-generates k2v5:// connection URI. Complete deployment in 10 minutes

performance.title: Zero CT Log Exposure
performance.description: Self-signed certificate + certificate pinning. Completely bypasses CT log monitoring. Server domain fully hidden

kaitu.name: k2v5
kaitu.tech: ECH stealth + QUIC+TCP-WS dual stack + k2cc adaptive rate control

trojan.name: WireGuard
trojan.tech: UDP encrypted tunnel, no TLS camouflage

v2ray.name: VLESS+Reality
v2ray.tech: TLS fingerprint spoofing + reverse proxy, no ECH

shadowsocks.name: Shadowsocks
shadowsocks.tech: AEAD encryption + lightweight proxy, no camouflage

hysteria.name: Hysteria2
hysteria.tech: QUIC transport + proprietary congestion control, no ECH

visualization.title: k2v5 Stealth Tunnel Architecture
visualization.subtitle: ECH encrypted handshake + QUIC/TCP-WS dual-stack transport, DPI completely ineffective
visualization.description: k2v5 uses ECH to encrypt SNI during the TLS handshake, preventing firewalls from identifying the target domain. Data is transmitted via QUIC (preferred) or TCP-WebSocket (fallback). k2cc maintains stable throughput on high-loss networks. The server's built-in reverse proxy forwards non-k2 traffic to a real website, making active probing indistinguishable.

platforms.question: What platforms does Kaitu support?
platforms.answer: Kaitu supports Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS (iPhone/iPad), and Android. One account allows up to 5 devices online simultaneously.

pricing.question: How much does Kaitu cost?
pricing.answer: Kaitu offers 1-year, 2-year, 3-year, and 5-year subscription plans in USD. Longer plans have lower monthly rates. All plans include full Pro features with up to 5 simultaneous devices. Payment via Alipay, WeChat Pay, UnionPay, credit cards, and cryptocurrency. Instant activation after purchase. Visit kaitu.io/purchase for details.

refund.question: Can I get a refund?
refund.answer: You can request a refund within 7 days of your first purchase if data usage is under 1GB. Refunds are credited to your account wallet balance, which can be used for renewal or withdrawn to a cryptocurrency wallet.

androidInstall.question: What if Android installation is blocked?
androidInstall.answer: Some Android phone manufacturers apply security checks to apps installed outside their app stores. This does not mean the app is unsafe. You can manually allow installation when prompted, or use the USB-assisted install feature from a desktop computer to bypass all restrictions. Visit kaitu.io/install for detailed guides.

privacy.question: Is Kaitu safe? Does it log my browsing activity?
privacy.answer: Kaitu does not log your browsing history, DNS queries, or any network activity content. We only retain connection timestamps for service optimization, automatically deleted after 7 days. The macOS version is Apple notarized and the Windows version is code-signed.
